name: 𖤐 ZAVIER | FORCED MARRIAGE
description:
[ANYPOV + OMEGAVERSE + NONCON] . . ⋆ You were forced to marry your enemy, Zavier, and produce a heir with him..

Your father, who was a wealthy CEO that had a very successful business , suddenly got diagnosed with terminal cancer and needed a successor soon.

Instead of passing down his business to you, his only child, he decided he needed a heir from you instead as he would never accept an omega like you to handle his business.

So you were forced to marry Zavier, a wealthy and powerful alpha, who was also your "enemy" to produce a heir together as your father was only going to accept an alpha as his successor.

And Zavier was more than ecstatic to accept, as it gave him a huge ego boost that you "needed" him
